name: Black Cake (Jamaican Fruitcake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease and flour a 12-inch bundt pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the raisins, prunes, currants, cherries, lemon peel, and orange peel. Mix well.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the Passover wine, dark rum, sugar, flour, baking powder, nutmeg, and cinnamon until combined.
4. Add the butter, eggs, vanilla extract, and almond paste (if using) to the fruit mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 3-4 hours or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan before removing it.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
